title: Error when using a for loop variable in a slice range

features.name: variable width part select with loop variable
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a variable used as width in a variable part select operator (0+:width or 0-:width)
features.snippet: for (int i = 1; i <= 8; i++) result = data[0+:i];

features.name: indexed part select with loop variable as start
features.description: Code should include a for loop with a variable used as the start index in an indexed part select [start:constant]
features.snippet: for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) result = data[i:0];
